title: feat: inspect: surface the image's Comment field
body:
## Problem

`skopeo inspect` does not show the image's `Comment` field. `docker inspect` and `podman inspect` do.

## Fix

Populate `Output.Comment` from the image config blob: top-level `comment` first, then last non-empty `history[].comment`. Field is `omitempty` — images without either are unchanged.

## Tests

`TestCommentFromConfigBlob` — 11 table-driven subtests (top-level, history, fallback, precedence, malformed, empty). Passes with `-race`.

Verified end-to-end against podman inspect on an Ubuntu Lima VM: byte-equal output for buildah-commented and alpine images, across `containers-storage:`, `dir:`, `oci:`, `oci-archive:`, `docker-archive:`, `docker-daemon:`, and `docker://` transports.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/2098
